title: Ability to change/customize the template of "Creative brief" and "Docs"

posts.author: jroeda (Josh Roeda)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

If I create a subitem with a creative brief or doc column. I have to start from scratch from a monday designed default template on every single creative brief created. This is inefficient.

What are you trying to achieve

Customize any creative brief or doc template to be laid out by default the way my company needs it.

posts.author: zoe.sgt (Zoe | SGTLab)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can actually set a default Doc template for the whole Doc column:

In the Doc column, click the three dots (⋮) → Settings → Set Doc template.

template1325×668 73.1 KB

Then every new Doc you create in that column will automatically use that template.
Hope this helps!
Zoe | SGTLab
